coupon.source_phrase_block:
465 Huntington Avenue Boston, Boston, MA, 02115
                                                            
    Map
617-267-9300
The Museum is open Wednesday through Monday.
Each pass now allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $14. Children 6 and under are free. 
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
